aboutMe.headline: About me
aboutMe.text: Hey, I'm Jens! I'm a passionate frontend developer who loves turning ideas into real digital experiences. I see every challenge as a chance to think more efficiently and find elegant solutions. Curiosity drives me — whether it's new technologies, cleaner code, or more thoughtful design. Let's collaborate and build something remarkable together!
aboutMe.cardImgAlt3: Decorative torn paper card home office

skills.head: My Stack
skills.cardtext: Extensive expertise in modern web technologies, versatile from UI design to backend development.
skills.cardImgAlt: Decorative torn paper for skills section
skills.cardImgAltMobile: Decorative torn paper for skills section (mobile)

contact.headline: Ready to work together?
contact.texttop: I look forward to hearing from you! Let me know what role you see me in within your team. With my experience, passion for modern web technologies, and constant willingness to learn, I am confident that I can provide real added value.
contact.textbottom: I am open to new projects and challenges and bring not only technical expertise but also team spirit and creativity. Let’s create something great together!

legalNotice.headline: Legal Notice
legalNotice.address: [Address of the JOIN operator - e.g. one of the students]
legalNotice.acceptanceText: By accessing and using Portfolio (Product), you acknowledge and agree to the following terms and conditions, and any policies, guidelines, or amendments thereto that may be presented to you from time to time. We, the listed students, may update or change the terms and conditions from time to time without notice.
legalNotice.scopeHeadline: Scope and ownership of the product
legalNotice.scopeText1: Portfolio has been developed as part of a student group project in a web development bootcamp at the Developer Akademie GmbH. It has an educational purpose and is not intended for extensive personal & business usage. As such, we cannot guarantee consistent availability, reliability, accuracy, or any other aspect of quality regarding this Product.
legalNotice.scopeText2: The design of Portfolio is owned by the Developer Akademie GmbH. Unauthorized use, reproduction, modification, distribution, or replication of the design is strictly prohibited.
legalNotice.proprietaryText: Aside from the design owned by Developer Akademie GmbH, we, the listed students, retain all proprietary rights in Portfolio, including any associated copyrighted material, trademarks, and other proprietary information.
legalNotice.useText: Portfolio is intended to be used for lawful purposes only, in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations. Any use of Portfolio for illegal activities, or to harass, harm, threaten, or intimidate another person, is strictly prohibited. You are solely responsible for your interactions with other users of Portfolio.
legalNotice.disclaimerHeadline: Disclaimer of warranties and limitation of liability
legalNotice.disclaimerText: Portfolio is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. In no event will we, the listed students, or the Developer Akademie, be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential or exemplary damages, including but not limited to, damages for loss of profits, goodwill, use, data, or other intangible losses, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages, arising out of or in connection with the use or performance of Portfolio.
legalNotice.indemnityText: You agree to indemnify, defend and hold harmless us, the listed students, the Developer Akademie, and our affiliates, partners, officers, directors, agents, and employees, from and against any claim, demand, loss, damage, cost, or liability (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or relating to your use of Portfolio and/or your breach of this Legal Notice.
legalNotice.contact: For any questions or notices, please contact us at [Contact Email].
